texto: I am called by many names: Destiny, Fate, Fortune; however, I prefer Moira, for it sounds as if I have a heart. I do not.I oversee human destinies, and all things happen exactly as I intend. Some try to deceive me, but I am Moira. I will not be cheated.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jeri Baird: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I am called by many names: Destiny, Fate, Fortune; however, I prefer Moira, for it sounds as if I…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, fate, young-adult-fantasy pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e young-adult-fantasy.
